  "findings": [
    "Pneumatic pressure test is being conducted without an established exclusion zone or barricades.",
    "Severe safety hazard due to stored energy in compressed gas without personnel protection."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Immediately stop the pressure testing work and depressurize the system safely.",
    "Evacuate unauthorized personnel from the immediate testing area.",
    "Erect physical barricades and post warning signs to establish a secure exclusion zone before resuming."
  ],
  "rationale": "Pneumatic testing involves significant stored energy and presents a high risk of catastrophic failure. ASME B31.3 §345.5 requires strict safety precautions, including a preliminary check and minimizing exposure to personnel. Conducting a pneumatic test without a designated exclusion zone violates basic safety sequences and code requirements, necessitating an immediate halt to the work.",
  "references": [
    "ASME B31.3 §345.5",
    "ASME B31.3 §345.2.1"
  ]
